built_sites.no_renewal_tier: No renewal tier listing is configured. Customers won't be able to renew their sites until you create one (a no-check-in, hidden listing with <em>Months Per Unit</em> > 0).
built_sites.rotate_token_confirm: The old URL will stop working. Continue?
built_sites.secrets_count: This site has {present} secret(s) set. We copy {expected} secret(s) to freshly built sites.
built_sites.all_secrets_present: All expected secrets are present on this site.
built_sites.missing_secrets: Missing from this site (existing secrets are never overwritten):
built_sites.infra_secrets_note: some of these are host-level infrastructure credentials ({names}). Built sites run on your own infrastructure, so copying them is expected — but be aware this hands the child site host-level access, not just per-site config.
built_sites.delete_confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete the built site {name}?
built_sites.delete_confirmation_prompt: Type the site name "{name}" to confirm:
built_sites.update_unknown_version: Unknown — no read-only database credentials are stored for this site (or it predates version reporting).
built_sites.update_latest_none: None checked yet — use the Update page to check for the latest release.
built_sites.update_available: An update is available for this site.
built_sites.update_up_to_date: This site is on the latest known release.
built_sites.update_confirm: Deploy the latest release to this site now?
built_sites.update_unavailable: Automatic update needs BUNNY_API_KEY on this host and a Bunny script ID on this site.
